arts.ttl: Man Utd make offer for Raphinha - Monday's gossip
arts.sum: Barcelona's Raphinha is linked with a return to England, Eduardo Camavinga is on Manchester City's radar, and Premier League rivals target Marcus Thuram.

arts.ttl: Barça go top as Yamal, Torres cap rally vs. Atleti
arts.sum: Barcelona's Ferran Torres' scored twice to help secure a late 4-2 comeback win at Atletico Madrid in a pulsating LaLiga clash on Sunday that took the Catalans back to the top of the table.

arts.ttl: Takeaways: Atlético’s week from hell ends with a Barcelona rally at the Metropolitano
arts.sum: Goals from Julián Alvarez and Alexander Sørloth had the red and white side of Madrid bouncing, but Barça hit back instantaneously through Robert Lewandowski, Ferrán Torres and a horribly-deflected Lamine Yamal shot. The last 19 days have seen Atlético play Real Madrid twice, Barcelona twice, Athletic Club and Getafe CF across three different competitions.

arts.ttl: Atletico Madrid 2-4 Barcelona: Highlights, man of the match, stats as stunning late turnaround sees Catalan giants return to La Liga summit
arts.sum: Barcelona fight back from two goals behind to record a stunning 4-2 victory over title rivals Atletico Madrid in Sunday night's La Liga contest at Wanda Metropolitano.

arts.ttl: Barcelona star breaks the 20 assist mark for the season

arts.ttl: Atletico Madrid 2-4 Barcelona: Stunning comeback sends Blaugrana top of La Liga
arts.sum: Barca return to the top of LaLiga despite trailing 2-0 with 20 minutes to play

arts.ttl: Atletico Madrid 2-4 Barcelona: Player Ratings as Lamine Yamal Completes Brilliant Barca Comeback
arts.sum: Barcelona came from behind late to defeat Atlético Madrid and return to the top of La Liga.

arts.ttl: Lamine Yamal equals Ansu Fati record as Barcelona complete comeback vs Atlético Madrid
arts.sum: Barcelona star Lamine Yamal has on Sunday evening secured for himself yet more Spanish football history. This comes owing to his exploits in Barcelona’s La Liga meeting with Atlético Madrid.…
